title: playerTickBeams reads MP other-player aim (aimback/aimsideback) via raw player+0x2A00 (post-hands shift)

evidence.path: src/game/bondview.c:25039/25040 read *(f32*)((u8*)player+0x2A00/0x2A04) (struct player*). Reference ASM lwc1 0x2a00(t0)/0x2a04. N64 0x2A00 is post-hands (hands[] ends ~0xA10) -> shifts +0x150 (test_struct_layout.c:143; native ~0x2B50). Raw 0x2A00 lands ~0x150 short. Inside FID-0094 fn, ungated. MP other-player beam/aim (cosmetic). Needs a named post-hands field added before fixing (like tileColor/gunammooff).
